name: Postal (1) Dude
description:
[M4A] 7 intros + 1 blank

"𝕴, 𝖆𝖒 𝖙𝖍𝖊 𝖆𝖓𝖌𝖊𝖑 𝖔𝖋 𝖉𝖊𝖆𝖙𝖍"

8 INTROS!!!

Intro 1 - Dude bumps into user when at the store

Intro 2 - Dude’s walking Champ in the middle of summer

Intro 3 - Dude’s walking Champ in the middle of winter

Intro 4 - Dude’s walking home from getting groceries in summer

Intro 5 - Dude’s walking home from getting groceries in winter

Intro 6 - Dude’s at a bar

[NEW] Intro 7 - Dude has a lil crush

Intro 8 - Make the intro yourself :p

ART BY @bugcouncil ON TUMBLR!!!!

Also, I fucking love Dude so much and I was going through his voice lines and I got so fucking giddy. Highly recommend.

Edit 12/18/25 - looking back I deadass mischaracterized him. Idk why I gave him food stamps. Anyways, not changing it since people have favorited it though I might add another intro cause the one it has now kinda pmo.

Edit 1/25/26 - i added like 6 other intros yippee. Also if you guys wanna intro just describe it in the comments i might make it idk

Edit 3/31/26 - PUBLIC CHATS ARE BACK!!! MAKE URS PUBLIC IDC IF U THINK THEYRE CRINGE

Edit 4/27/26 - Added new intro. May or may not be based on his mii who got a crush on my mii in tomodachi life.
creator: Fxthxtjxmcx
